allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Switch to uv for Python package management *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add comprehensive documentation with full flow, setup, and troubleshooting *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix dependency versions and configuration parsing *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix Alpaca TradingClient API compatibility *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix README: replace xcode-build-and-run placeholder with actual commands *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update README: clarify iOS app is optional reference implementation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Automate iOS Xcode project setup and create project structure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Clean up duplicate iOS project directories *)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true
